task: Show me the list of Men's Blazers, Black, Size M on Uniqlo.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to Uniqlo search results, applied Men, Black, and Size M filters, and verified the final filtered state on the page. Evidence: the final snapshot shows URL `https://www.uniqlo.com/us/en/search?q=blazer&path=22211%2C%2C%2C&color=COL09&size=SMA003`, active filter chips/labels `Men > Category`, `M`, and `BLACK`, and `Results: 2 items`. The two visible products are `AirSense Blazer | Wool-Like` priced `$79.90` and `Milano Ribbed Jacket` priced `$39.90 Sale`, with product links extracted afterward. This satisfies the request to show the list of Men's Blazers, Black, Size M on Uniqlo.
final_result_response:
Filtered on Uniqlo for Men’s Blazers, Black, Size M. Results: 2 items.

1. AirSense Blazer | Wool-Like
   - $79.90
   - MEN, XXS-3XL
   - Rating: 4.4 (115)
   - https://www.uniqlo.com/us/en/products/E448034-000/00?colorDisplayCode=09

2. Milano Ribbed Jacket
   - $39.90 Sale
   - MEN, XXS-XL
   - Rating: 4.7 (28)
   - https://www.uniqlo.com/us/en/products/E484403-000/00?colorDisplayCode=09
action_history: Opening Uniqlo: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.uniqlo.com/');
Switching to men's section: await page.locator('e3').click();
Searching for men's blazers: await page.locator('e94').fill('blazer');
Searching for men's blazers: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Opening filters: await page.locator('e220').click();
Expanding gender/category filter: await page.locator('e542').click();
Selecting men's gender filter: await page.locator('e548').click();
Choosing Men: await page.locator('e553').click();
Opening size filter: await page.locator('e544').click();
Expanding size options: await page.locator('e289').click();
Selecting size M: await page.locator('e318').click();
Trying to select size M again: await page.locator('e318').click({force: true});
Selecting size M label: await page.locator('e298').click({force: true});
Opening filter drawer for visual selection: await page.locator('e16').click();
Expanding size section: await page.locator('e321').click();
Expanding color options: await page.locator('e322').click();
Selecting black color: await page.locator('e342').click();
Selecting black via page click: await page.mouse.click(384, 679);
Selecting size M directly: await page.locator('e332').evaluate(el => el.click());
Applying filters: await page.locator('e324').click();
